screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: This is the landing page of a web application, designed to introduce the product's features and encourage visitors to sign up for a free trial or request early access.

screens.name: Store
screens.purpose: This is the store screen of a web app, designed for users to browse and purchase subscription plans and add-ons.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: This is a workspace dashboard designed to provide a high-level overview of team metrics, project progress, and recent activity.

screens.name: Tasks
screens.purpose: This is the Tasks screen, which is used for creating, managing, and tracking a user's to-do list.

screens.name: Contact
screens.purpose: This is the Contact screen of the web app, designed to allow users to get in touch with the company's team by filling out an inquiry form or using the provided contact details.
